2004-06-28‚ÄéWent to the beach again! it was waaaaaaaaaay rougher than yesterday...a kid got caught in a rip! but it wasw heaps of fun
column2: the waves were breaking really late so jade and wade enjoyed that! also that meant it was calmer out deeper so i could actually swim without being severely dumped by the waves (i did get dumped tho!) it was a great day
column4: and i managed to get some fotos! here they are!

column1: 2004-06-28‚Äéi went to the beach today.....so much fun! was goin really well till a massive wave dumped me and i got caught underwater in my boogie board string. i swallowed so much water and got so much sand up my nose and everywhere else...lol. i felt heaps sick so that was it for me...wasnt really that hot anyway! wade and jade bought home some oysters that they dug up
column2: then we went to look at the pretty sea- views. so that was my interesting day!

column1: 2004-07-22‚Äéskool has been good...made more frends so far and i seem to be accepted into a group (the same group i was with on the first day...yes they did want me back!) and everythings been cruising really....hmmm...the skools really wierd. they dont have locker bays...the skool must be so pov! anyway a new girl started on friday so t  hat was awesome
column2: jumped in as quick as i could i guess! i need a close friend! lol. i went to the social that was on the other nite...really good but mega wild! lol. anyways betta go now! bye!

column1: 2004-07-13‚Äéhey! 2day was my first day at skool...real scary! but it was ok...found some girls to sit with at lunchtime and it turned out ok. i hope they still want me tomorrow! or ill be a wez! lol. im not sure who ill fit in with yet
column2: but atleast i got some pplz to help me on my feet! so i can safely say i had a good day...thank god!
